summary: 10 findings: 1 HIGH (unused exported functions), 3 MEDIUM (unused alias, unused function, incomplete path docs), 1 HIGH (EC-006 confirmed: CONFIGURATION.md path mismatch), 2 LOW (debug prints, hardcoded brand name), 1 INFO (Windows-only scope intentional)

entries.title: Unused exported functions with no callers
entries.problem: get_conversations_db_path() and get_seed_state_path() are exported functions with no callers in the codebase. Dead code or planned-but-unimplemented features.
entries.fix: Remove these functions or implement their consumers

entries.title: Unused convenience alias get_app_dir()
entries.problem: get_app_dir() duplicates get_user_data_dir() with no external callers.
entries.fix: Remove get_app_dir() or consolidate callers to use get_user_data_dir()

entries.title: Unused exported function find_bundled_model()
entries.problem: find_bundled_model() is exported but has no callers. Scans models/ directory but is dead code.

entries.title: Debug print statements in production code
entries.problem: Five print() statements for debugging remain in production code. Should use logging.debug().
entries.fix: Replace with logging.debug() calls or remove entirely

entries.title: Brand name mismatch in docstring
entries.problem: Docstring references 'AFOMIS Help and Support' but project documentation uses 'Document Q&A Assistant'.
entries.fix: Update docstring to match project brand name

entries.title: EC-006 confirmed: CONFIGURATION.md path mismatch
entries.problem: CONFIGURATION.md documents settings at AppData/DocumentQA/app_settings.json but app_paths.py resolves to %LOCALAPPDATA%/AFOMIS Help and Support/settings.json. Paths are completely different.
entries.fix: Update CONFIGURATION.md to document actual path: %LOCALAPPDATA%/AFOMIS Help and Support/settings.json

entries.title: Incomplete path documentation in CONFIGURATION.md
entries.problem: CONFIGURATION.md documents doc_qa_db/rag_config.json but does not specify the parent directory. Full path is %LOCALAPPDATA%/AFOMIS Help and Support/doc_qa_db/.
entries.fix: Update CONFIGURATION.md to show full absolute paths with correct parent

entries.title: Hardcoded brand name in path construction
entries.problem: Directory name 'AFOMIS Help and Support' is hardcoded without configuration option.
entries.fix: Extract to module-level constant or environment variable

entries.title: Docstring inaccurate for get_settings_path
entries.problem: Docstring claims 'Creates the directory if it doesn't exist' but get_settings_path() only returns a Path; directory creation is in get_user_data_dir().
entries.fix: Fix docstring to remove inaccurate 'Creates the directory' claim
